summary: Master SKU Architecture with BOM and Production testing complete. Backend: 18/19 tests passed (1 test setup error due to duplicate SKU code from previous run - not a bug). Frontend: All features verified working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Master SKU Architecture with BOM fully verified. All endpoints working: GET/POST/PATCH /api/master-skus, POST/DELETE /api/master-skus/{id}/aliases, GET /api/master-skus/{id}/stock, GET /api/master-skus/stock/all, POST /api/production with use_bom=true.
